title: Precita Eyes Muralists Mural Tours - PRECITA EYES MURALISTS
content: - Community Spirit and Legacy of Precita Eyes. + Community Spirit & Legacy of Precita Eyes-Video. | Carmela Gaspar of Precita Eyes Muralists giving a Tour of Balmy Alley  *“Had a super great tour today with Carmela! I'd been to Balmy Alley many times before but learned a lot from Carmela today ;)”* | **Saturday Morning Special Mural Walk ​Led by Carmela Gaspar** ​ **Next Tours: Saturday,****June 13** **at 11:30am**  Born and raised in San Francisco, multidisciplinary artist Carmela Gaspar shares with us her love of the city and the people who lend their magic to it. * **Meet At:** Precita Eyes Mural Arts Center - 2981 24th Street, near Harrison Street  * **​****Tickets Available:** Now, online - also at the door, day of the tour - $25/General Admission; $15/Seniors 65 and over; $10/Youth 17 and under * **Reservations:** Are not necessary - All are welcome * **Duration:** Approximately 1.5 hours​​​  Book Now |.
